name: net_connection_win_domain_dead_drop_resolvers
raw_query: any where (network.direction:"true" and (destination.domain like~ ("*.t.me", "*4shared.com", "*abuse.ch", "*anonfiles.com", "*cdn.discordapp.com", "*cloudflare.com", "*ddns.net", "*discord.com", "*docs.google.com", "*drive.google.com", "*dropbox.com", "*dropmefiles.com", "*facebook.com", "*feeds.rapidfeeds.com", "*fotolog.com", "*ghostbin.co/", "*githubusercontent.com", "*gofile.io", "*hastebin.com", "*imgur.com", "*livejournal.com", "*mediafire.com", "*mega.co.nz", "*mega.nz", "*onedrive.com", "*pages.dev", "*paste.ee", "*pastebin.com", "*pastebin.pl", "*pastetext.net", "*pixeldrain.com", "*privatlab.com", "*privatlab.net", "*reddit.com", "*send.exploit.in", "*sendspace.com", "*steamcommunity.com", "*storage.googleapis.com", "*technet.microsoft.com", "*temp.sh", "*transfer.sh", "*trycloudflare.com", "*twitter.com", "*ufile.io", "*vimeo.com", "*w3spaces.com", "*wetransfer.com", "*workers.dev", "*youtube.com"))) and (not ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe")) or (process.executable:"C:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe") or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe")) or (process.executable:"C:\\Users\\*" and process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe") or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe")) or (process.executable:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeWebView\\Application\\*" or process.executable:"*\\WindowsApps\\MicrosoftEdge.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"))) or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*")) and (process.executable like~ ("*\\msedge.exe", "*\\msedgewebview2.exe"))) or ((process.executable like~ ("*C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Safari\\*", "*C:\\Program Files\\Safari\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\safari.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("*C:\\Program Files\\Windows Defender Advanced Threat Protection\\*", "*C:\\Program Files\\Windows Defender\\*", "*C:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Platform\\*")) and (process.executable like~ ("*\\MsMpEng.exe", "*\\MsSense.exe"))) or (process.executable like~ ("*C:\\Program Files (x86)\\PRTG Network Monitor\\PRTG Probe.exe", "*C:\\Program Files\\PRTG Network Monitor\\PRTG Probe.exe")) or (process.executable:"C:\\Program Files\\BraveSoftware\\*" and process.executable:"*\\brave.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Maxthon\\*" and process.executable:"*\\maxthon.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Opera\\*" and process.executable:"*\\opera.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\SeaMonkey\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SeaMonkey\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\seamonkey.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Vivaldi\\*" and process.executable:"*\\vivaldi.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Naver\\Naver Whale\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Naver\\Naver Whale\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\whale.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Waterfox\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Waterfox\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\Waterfox.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\midori-ng\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Midori Next Generation.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\SlimBrowser\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SlimBrowser\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\slimbrowser.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Flock\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Flock.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Phoebe\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Phoebe.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Falkon\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Falkon\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\falkon.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\QtWeb\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\QtWeb\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\QtWeb.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Avant Browser\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Avant Browser\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\avant.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\WindowsApps\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\WhatsApp.exe" and destination.domain:"*facebook.com") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Roaming\\Telegram Desktop\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Telegram.exe" and destination.domain:"*.t.me") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\*" and process.executable:"*\\OneDrive.exe" and destination.domain:"*onedrive.com") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Dropbox\\Client\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Dropbox\\Client\\*")) and (process.executable like~ ("*\\Dropbox.exe", "*\\DropboxInstaller.exe")) and destination.domain:"*dropbox.com") or ((process.executable like~ ("*\\MEGAsync.exe", "*\\MEGAsyncSetup32_*RC.exe", "*\\MEGAsyncSetup32.exe", "*\\MEGAsyncSetup64.exe", "*\\MEGAupdater.exe")) and (destination.domain like~ ("*mega.co.nz", "*mega.nz"))) or ((process.executable like~ ("*C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Drive File Stream\\*", "*C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Drive File Stream\\*")) and process.executable:"*GoogleDriveFS.exe" and destination.domain:"*drive.google.com") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Discord\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Discord.exe" and (destination.domain like~ ("*discord.com", "*cdn.discordapp.com"))) or (?process.executable == null) or process.executable==""))
